ignoreCommand: BASE_SHA=${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-}; if [ -z "$BASE_SHA" ] || ! git cat-file -e "$BASE_SHA^{commit}" 2>/dev/null; then BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD^ 2>/dev/null) || exit 1; fi; CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only "$BASE_SHA" HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 1; ! printf '%s\n' "$CHANGED" | grep -qE '^(static/|build-utils/|src/sentry/locale/|src/sentry/static/sentry/images/|package\.json$|pnpm-lock\.yaml$|tsconfig\.json$|rspack\.config\.ts$|vercel\.json$|\.vercelignore$)'
